name: Anshin Guarantor Service Co., Ltd.
summary: Anshin Guarantor Service Co., Ltd. engages in the guarantee business of rent debt in Japan. Its product includes Anshin Plus, Life Anshin Plus, AEON Card De Yachin, and Aplus Anshin Rent Guarantee, as well as provides online application and remittance services. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
